query:
-- Check all billing assignments for S0467
SELECT 
  sba.id,
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  sba.serviceExternalId,
  sba.assignmentMethod,
  sba.assignmentBucket,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.planName,
  s.supplierName
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = 'S0467'
ORDER BY sba.id;
